name: fable-advisor
description: Independent second-opinion reviewer on the fable model. A SessionStart hook injects advisor-style trigger instructions so the top-level agent invokes the fable-advisor skill at the right checkpoints; the skill spawns a fable agent that reads the full conversation and returns a course-correction. Replaces the built-in advisor tool when it is disabled or unavailable. Stays silent when the session itself already runs a fable model.
